name: Frozen Cranberry Salad
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces can jellied whole cranberry sauce
Fresh mint leaves, fresh cranberries for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients and stir until smooth.
2. Stir in the cranberry sauce, pineapple, and pecans.
3. Beat whipping cream until foamy. Gradually add powdered sugar, beating until soft peaks form. Stir in 1 teaspoon vanilla extract.
4. Fold the whipped cream mixture into the cranberry mixture.
5. Spoon the mixture into an 8-inch square dish.
6. Cover and freeze until firm.
7. Cut into squares and serve on lettuce leaves. Garnish with mint and fresh cranberries.
